$:/languages/en-GB/plugins/uzvg/twks-ale.title: $:/languages/en-GB/plugins/uzvg/twks-alerter/readme
$:/languages/en-GB/plugins/uzvg/twks-ale.text:
!! 1. Introduction:

`twks-alerter` is used to create structured alert blocks with icons and titles within pages. It supports multiple preset types (such as warning, note, tip, etc.) to highlight critical information, provide supplementary explanations, or offer operational guidance, thereby enhancing the content's hierarchy and readability.

!! 2. Usage Syntax:

This plugin is invoked as a `procedure`. You can use TiddlyWiki's standard macro call syntax:

```
<<twks-alerter type:"type" text:"content body" title:"custom title (optional)">>
```

!! 3. Parameter Reference:

The component accepts three core parameters, detailed as follows:

| !Parameter | !Required | !Description |
|`type` | Yes | Specifies the type of the alert block, determining the icon, default title, and styling color. |
|`text` | Yes | The detailed content displayed within the alert block. Supports Wikitext. |
|`title` | No | Overrides the default title. If omitted, the default name for the corresponding type is displayed. |

The plugin includes 5 preset types, each with a corresponding icon:

| !Type | !Default Title | !Corresponding Icon (Core Icon) |
|`note` |''Note:'' |`$:/core/images/info-button` |
|`tip` |''Tip:'' |`$:/core/images/tip` |
|`important` |''Important:'' |`$:/core/images/info-button` |
|`warning` |''Warning:'' |`$:/core/images/warning` |
|`caution` |''Caution:'' |`$:/core/images/warning` |

!! 4. Usage Examples:

!!! A. Using Default Titles:

```
<<twks-alerter type:"note" text:"This is a basic note explanation.">>

<<twks-alerter type:"warning" text:"Be sure to back up your Wiki file before proceeding!">>
```

<<twks-alerter type:"note" text:"This is a basic note explanation.">>

<<twks-alerter type:"warning" text:"Be sure to back up your Wiki file before proceeding!">>

!!! B. Custom Titles:

If you find the default "Note:" or "Tip:" too rigid, you can manually pass the `title` parameter:

```tw
<<twks-alerter
  type:"tip"
  title:"Pro Tip"
  text:"You can press `Ctrl+Enter` to quickly save the current tiddler."
>>
```

<<twks-alerter
  type:"tip"
  title:"Pro Tip"
  text:"You can press `Ctrl+Enter` to quickly save the current tiddler."
>>

!!! C. Containing Wikitext:

You can include lists, bold text, or other TiddlyWiki syntax within the `text` parameter:

```
<<twks-alerter type:"important" text:"
Please ensure your TiddlyWiki version is ''v5.3.0'' or above, otherwise you may encounter:

* Failure to parse Procedures correctly
* Abnormal style rendering">>
```

<<twks-alerter type:"important" text:"
Please ensure your TiddlyWiki version is ''v5.3.0'' or above, otherwise you may encounter:

* Failure to parse Procedures correctly
* Abnormal style rendering">>

!!! D: Automatic Theme Switching:

<<twks-alerter tip "

* The plugin automatically detects the system's ''Color Scheme'' (dark or light mode) based on the palette (`$:/palette`) you are currently using.">>

$:/languages/zh-Hans/plugins/uzvg/twks-a.title: $:/languages/zh-Hans/plugins/uzvg/twks-alerter/readme
$:/languages/zh-Hans/plugins/uzvg/twks-a.text:
!! 1. 介绍：

`twks-alerter` 用于在页面中创建带有图标与标题的结构化提示信息块。它支持多种预设类型（如 warning、note、tip 等），可用于突出关键信息、补充说明或提供操作提示，从而提升内容的层次感与可读性。

!! 2. 使用语法：

该插件作为一个 `procedure` 调用，你可以使用 TiddlyWiki 标准的宏调用语法：

```
<<twks-alerter type:"类型" text:"内容正文" title:"自定义标题(可选)">>
```

!! 3. 参数介绍：

该组件接受三个核心参数，详细说明如下：

| !参数名 | !是否必填 | !描述 |
|`type` | 是 |指定警示块的类型，决定了图标、默认标题和样式颜色。 |
|`text` | 是 |警示块内显示的详细内容。支持 Wikitext。 |
|`title` | 否 |覆盖默认标题。如果不填，则显示对应类型的默认名称。 |

插件内置了 5 种预设类型，每种类型都有对应的图标：

| !类型 (Type) | !默认标题 | !对应图标 (Core Icon) |
|`note` |''Note:'' |`$:/core/images/info-button` |
|`tip` |''Tip:'' |`$:/core/images/tip` |
|`important` |''Important:'' |`$:/core/images/info-button` |
|`warning` |''Warning:'' |`$:/core/images/warning` |
|`caution` |''Caution:'' |`$:/core/images/warning` |

!! 4. 使用示例：

!!! A. 使用默认标题：

```
<<twks-alerter type:"note" text:"这是一个基础的笔记说明。">>

<<twks-alerter type:"warning" text:"操作前请务必备份你的 Wiki 文件！">>
```

<<twks-alerter type:"note" text:"这是一个基础的笔记说明。">>

<<twks-alerter type:"warning" text:"操作前请务必备份你的 Wiki 文件！">>

!!! B. 自定义标题：

如果你觉得默认的 "Note:" 或 "Tip:" 太死板，可以手动传入 `title` 参数：

```tw
<<twks-alerter
  type:"tip"
  title:"小技巧"
  text:"你可以按 `Ctrl+Enter` 快速保存当前条目。"
>>
```

<<twks-alerter
  type:"tip"
  title:"小技巧"
  text:"你可以按 `Ctrl+Enter` 快速保存当前条目。"
>>

!!! C. 包含wikitext：

你可以在`text`参数中加入列表、加粗或其他 TiddlyWiki 语法：

```
<<twks-alerter type:"important" text:"
请确保你的 TiddlyWiki 版本在 ''v5.3.0'' 以上，否则可能：

* 无法正常解析 Procedure
* 样式渲染异常">>
```

<<twks-alerter type:"important" text:"
请确保你的 TiddlyWiki 版本在 ''v5.3.0'' 以上，否则可能：

* 无法正常解析 Procedure
* 样式渲染异常">>

!!! D: 自动切换主题：

<<twks-alerter tip "

* 该插件会根据你当前使用的调色板（`$:/palette`）自动识别系统的 ''Color Scheme''（深色或浅色模式）。">>

$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-alerter/procedures/.title: $:/plugins/uzvg/twks-alerter/procedures/twks-alerter
$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-alerter/procedures/.text: \procedure twks-alerter(type,text,title) \function get-color-scheme() [[$:/palette]get[text]get[color-scheme]] \function get-alerter-icon() [match[warning]then[$:/core/images/warning]] [match[caution]then[$:/core/images/warning]] [match[note]then[$:/core/images/info-button]] [match[tip]then[$:/core/images/tip]] [match[important]then[$:/core/images/info-button]] \end get-alerter-icon \function get-default-title() [match[warning]then[Warning:]] [match[caution]then[Caution:]] [match[note]then[Note:]] [match[tip]then[Tip:]] [match[important]then[Important:]] \end get-default-title \function get-alerter-title() [!is[blank]else<get-default-title>] <div class="twks-alerter" data-alerter-type=<<type>> data-color-scheme=<<get-color-scheme>>> <div class="twks-alerter-icon"> <$transclude $tiddler=<<get-alerter-icon>>/> </div> <div class="twks-alerter-title"> <<get-alerter-title>> </div> <div class="twks-alerter-content"> <$transclude $variable="text" $mode="block"/> </div> </div> \end

$:/plugins/uzvg/twks-alerter/stylesheets.title: $:/plugins/uzvg/twks-alerter/stylesheets/twks-alerter.css
